description.title: Description
description.html:
The Hocco Hazelnut Mudslide Cone Ice Cream combines the rich, nutty flavour of hazelnuts with a creamy, chocolatey base. This indulgent dessert offers the perfect balance of sweet and nutty, all served in a crispy cone. It's a luxurious ice cream experience for anyone who loves chocolate and hazelnuts together.

  • Nutty Hazelnut flavour: This ice cream is infused with the bold flavour of roasted hazelnuts, providing a delicious nutty taste that complements the creamy chocolate base. The hazelnut flavour is distinct and rich, adding a satisfying depth to the ice cream. Itâs the perfect treat for hazelnut lovers, who will enjoy the nutty undertones in every bite. The roasted hazelnuts contribute a warm, earthy flavour, enhancing the overall richness of the ice cream and providing a decadent experience that makes this dessert feel both luxurious and comforting.
  • Chocolatey Mudslide Base: The chocolatey mudslide base is rich, smooth and indulgent, offering a creamy texture that perfectly balances the nuttiness of the hazelnuts. This chocolate base is the perfect partner for the hazelnut flavour, creating a harmonious blend of flavours that are both satisfying and decadent. The richness of the chocolate is complemented by the crunch of the hazelnuts, creating a delightful contrast of textures. The combination of chocolate and hazelnuts makes this ice cream a treat for anyone who enjoys the best of both worlds in a single cone.
  • Crispy Cone: This ice cream is served in a crispy cone that adds a satisfying crunch to each bite. The cone provides a perfect contrast to the smooth and creamy ice cream, giving you a variety of textures in every mouthful. Itâs light yet sturdy enough to hold the rich ice cream without breaking. The cone enhances the overall indulgence, making the experience of enjoying this ice cream even more enjoyable. Itâs a great way to enjoy your favorite ice cream while also getting the satisfying crunch of a quality cone with every bite.
  • Returns And Refund Policy: This item is eligible for a refund or replacement within 2 days of purchase, in an unlikely event of a damaged/defective/incorrect item. In case of an incorrect item , you may raise a refund or replacement request only if the item is sealed/unopened/unused.

info_cards.title: Description
info_cards.html:
The Hocco Hazelnut Mudslide Cone Ice Cream combines the rich, nutty flavour of hazelnuts with a creamy, chocolatey base. This indulgent dessert offers the perfect balance of sweet and nutty, all served in a crispy cone. It's a luxurious ice cream experience for anyone who loves chocolate and hazelnuts together.

  • Nutty Hazelnut flavour: This ice cream is infused with the bold flavour of roasted hazelnuts, providing a delicious nutty taste that complements the creamy chocolate base. The hazelnut flavour is distinct and rich, adding a satisfying depth to the ice cream. Itâs the perfect treat for hazelnut lovers, who will enjoy the nutty undertones in every bite. The roasted hazelnuts contribute a warm, earthy flavour, enhancing the overall richness of the ice cream and providing a decadent experience that makes this dessert feel both luxurious and comforting.
  • Chocolatey Mudslide Base: The chocolatey mudslide base is rich, smooth and indulgent, offering a creamy texture that perfectly balances the nuttiness of the hazelnuts. This chocolate base is the perfect partner for the hazelnut flavour, creating a harmonious blend of flavours that are both satisfying and decadent. The richness of the chocolate is complemented by the crunch of the hazelnuts, creating a delightful contrast of textures. The combination of chocolate and hazelnuts makes this ice cream a treat for anyone who enjoys the best of both worlds in a single cone.
  • Crispy Cone: This ice cream is served in a crispy cone that adds a satisfying crunch to each bite. The cone provides a perfect contrast to the smooth and creamy ice cream, giving you a variety of textures in every mouthful. Itâs light yet sturdy enough to hold the rich ice cream without breaking. The cone enhances the overall indulgence, making the experience of enjoying this ice cream even more enjoyable. info_cards.title: Ingredients
info_cards.html: Ice Cream (58.1%): Added Water, Milk Solids, Sugar, Brownie (10%) (Sugar, Maida, Cocoa Solids, Milk Solids, Maltodextrin, Corn Starch, Emulsifiers (INS 471, INS 472b, INS 477), Raising Agent (INS 500 (ii), INS 450 (i), INS 341 (i)), Stabilisers (INS 415), Salt), Hazelnut Paste (9%), Emulsifier (INS 471, INS 433) and Stabilisers (INS 466, INS 412, INS 407a, INS 415, INS 410). Topping and Spraying (30.3%): Choco Coating (19%) (Sugar, Cocoa Solid, Cocoa Butter, Palm Kernel oil, Emulsifier (INS 322, INS 476) CONTAINS ADDED NATURE IDENTICAL VANILLIN FLAVOURING SUBSTANCES), Choco Spraying (7.5%) (Sugar, Edible vegetable Palm Kernal oil, Cocos Solids, Emulsifier (INS 322) CONTAINS NATURE IDENTICAL VANILLIN FLAVOURING SUBSTANCES), Caramelised Nuts (3.8%) (Hazelnut, Almond, Sugar, Water). Wafer Biscuit Cone (11.6%): Wheat Flour, Sugar, Starch, Refined Vegetable Palm oil, Salt, Emulsifier (INS 322). CONTAINS PERMITTED NATURAL COLOURS (INS 150d) AND ARTIFKIAL VANILLA FLAVOURING SUBSTANCES.

Wafer Biscuit Cone (11.6%): Wheat Flour, Sugar, Starch, Refined Vegetable Palm oil, Salt, Emulsifier (INS 322). CONTAINS PERMITTED NATURAL COLOURS (INS 150d) AND ARTIFKIAL VANILLA FLAVOURING SUBSTANCES.

The Hocco Hazelnut Mudslide Cone Ice Cream combines the rich, nutty flavour of hazelnuts with a creamy, chocolatey base. This indulgent dessert offers the perfect balance of sweet and nutty, all served in a crispy cone. It's a luxurious ice cream experience for anyone who loves chocolate and hazelnuts together.

  • Nutty Hazelnut flavour: This ice cream is infused with the bold flavour of roasted hazelnuts, providing a delicious nutty taste that complements the creamy chocolate base. The hazelnut flavour is distinct and rich, adding a satisfying depth to the ice cream. Itâs the perfect treat for hazelnut lovers, who will enjoy the nutty undertones in every bite. The roasted hazelnuts contribute a warm, earthy flavour, enhancing the overall richness of the ice cream and providing a decadent experience that makes this dessert feel both luxurious and comforting.
  • Chocolatey Mudslide Base: The chocolatey mudslide base is rich, smooth and indulgent, offering a creamy texture that perfectly balances the nuttiness of the hazelnuts. This chocolate base is the perfect partner for the hazelnut flavour, creating a harmonious blend of flavours that are both satisfying and decadent. The richness of the chocolate is complemented by the crunch of the hazelnuts, creating a delightful contrast of textures. The combination of chocolate and hazelnuts makes this ice cream a treat for anyone who enjoys the best of both worlds in a single cone.
  • Crispy Cone: This ice cream is served in a crispy cone that adds a satisfying crunch to each bite. The cone provides a perfect contrast to the smooth and creamy ice cream, giving you a variety of textures in every mouthful. Itâs light yet sturdy enough to hold the rich ice cream without breaking. The cone enhances the overall indulgence, making the experience of enjoying this ice cream even more enjoyable. Itâs a great way to enjoy your favorite ice cream while also getting the satisfying crunch of a quality cone with every bite.
  • Returns And Refund Policy: This item is eligible for a refund or replacement within 2 days of purchase, in an unlikely event of a damaged/defective/incorrect item. In case of an incorrect item , you may raise a refund or replacement request only if the item is sealed/unopened/unused.

Ice Cream (58.1%): Added Water, Milk Solids, Sugar, Brownie (10%) (Sugar, Maida, Cocoa Solids, Milk Solids, Maltodextrin, Corn Starch, Emulsifiers (INS 471, INS 472b, INS 477), Raising Agent (INS 500 (ii), INS 450 (i), INS 341 (i)), Stabilisers (INS 415), Salt), Hazelnut Paste (9%), Emulsifier (INS 471, INS 433) and Stabilisers (INS 466, INS 412, INS 407a, INS 415, INS 410). Topping and Spraying (30.3%): Choco Coating (19%) (Sugar, Cocoa Solid, Cocoa Butter, Palm Kernel oil, Emulsifier (INS 322, INS 476) CONTAINS ADDED NATURE IDENTICAL VANILLIN FLAVOURING SUBSTANCES), Choco Spraying (7.5%) (Sugar, Edible vegetable Palm Kernal oil, Cocos Solids, Emulsifier (INS 322) CONTAINS NATURE IDENTICAL VANILLIN FLAVOURING SUBSTANCES), Caramelised Nuts (3.8%) (Hazelnut, Almond, Sugar, Water). Wafer Biscuit Cone (11.6%): Wheat Flour, Sugar, Starch, Refined Vegetable Palm oil, Salt, Emulsifier (INS 322). CONTAINS PERMITTED NATURAL COLOURS (INS 150d) AND ARTIFKIAL VANILLA FLAVOURING SUBSTANCES.
